Description: AI navigates terrain and obstacles efficiently.

Example Use Case: AI ambushes the player with tactics.

Description: AI searches for and collects useful items.
Example Use Case: NPCs gather scrap metal for crafting.

Description: AI interacts with the player via scripted responses.
AI responds to alliances and rivalries.
AI adjusts difficulty based on player actions.
AI reacts to sound and movement.
Example Use Case: Guards alert others when player is near.

Description: AI assigns, tracks, and updates missions.
Example Use Case: A survivor gives the player a side quest.

Description: NPCs react to hunger, thirst, and shelter needs.
Example Use Case: AI scavengers seek water in a drought.

Description: AI behavior changes based on ethical choices.
Example Use Case: Friendly NPCs turn hostile if betrayed.
